name: Slurm Resource Estimator
summary: Estimate future Slurm resource requests from accounting history.
description: This skill uses sacct output to help users choose safer memory, CPU, and wall-time requests for similar Slurm jobs.

inputs.name: job_name
inputs.description: Optional job name pattern to filter accounting history.

inputs.name: days
inputs.description: Number of days of history to inspect.

outputs.name: resource_history
outputs.description: Tabular sacct report for previous jobs.

outputs.name: request_recommendation
outputs.description: Human-reviewed recommendation for memory and wall time.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Run against a user with sacct access and compare MaxRSS and Elapsed against submitted resources.
